name: loop-factory
description: Git-first autonomous loop factory for issue intake, worktree execution, agent review, verification, and PR evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous Git-first agent loops for software teams
interface.longDescription: Loop Factory installs reusable docs, task packets, skills, and agent role playbooks so Codex and Claude Code can run issue-to-PR loops with worktrees, review agents, verifier gates, and durable GitHub evidence.
defaultPrompt: Set up Loop Factory in this repo.
Turn this requirement into an autonomous issue-to-PR loop.
